data.chapter_title_en: Invocations for the setting of a debt
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ اكْفِنِي بِحَلاَلِكَ عَنْ حَرَامِكَ، وَأَغْنِنِي بِفَضْلِكِ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, make what is lawful enough for me, as opposed to what is unlawful, and spare me by Your grace, of need of others.)
data.transliteration: (Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahummak-finee bihalalika AAan haramik, wa-aghninee bifadlika AAamman siwak.)
